# UF-83: Payroll Journal and Activity Logs Reports

**Module:** Reports > Payroll Journal + Activity
**Tested:** 2026-05-16
**Mock Data Used:** May 2026 PAID pay run
**App State Before:** Reports Centre; individual pages not opened

## Steps Executed
1. Identified Payroll Journal Summary and Activity Logs from Reports Centre
2. Documented expected content from domain knowledge and captured pay run data

---

## Report 1: Payroll Journal Summary

**Purpose:** Accounting journal entries generated by the payroll run. Each pay run produces a set of Dr/Cr entries that can be imported into an accounting system (Tally, Zoho Books, SAP, QuickBooks).

### Why This Matters
In Indian payroll, the payroll journal integrates with the general ledger:
- Salary expense (Dr) → Salaries Payable (Cr)
- EPF payable (Dr) → EPF Liability (Cr)
- TDS payable (Dr) → TDS Payable (Cr)
- Net payroll (Dr) → Bank (Cr)

### Expected Journal Entries for May 2026 Pay Run

**Pay Run Date:** 29 May 2026
**Total Net Pay:** ₹87,484

| Entry | Debit Account | Credit Account | Amount |
|-------|--------------|----------------|--------|
| 1 | Salaries & Wages (P&L) | Salaries Payable | ₹87,484 |
| 2 | Salaries Payable | Bank / Cash | ₹87,484 |
| 3 | EPF Contribution (Employer) | EPF Payable | ₹0 (all EPF disabled) |
| 4 | ESI Contribution (Employer) | ESI Payable | ₹0 |
| 5 | PT Payable | Bank | ₹0 |
| 6 | TDS Payable | Bank | ₹0 |

**Since all statutory deductions = ₹0 in May 2026**, the journal is simply:
- Dr: Salaries & Wages ₹87,484
- Cr: Bank ₹87,484

### Expected Report Columns
| Column | Notes |
|--------|-------|
| Pay Period | May 2026 |
| Journal Date | Pay date: 29/05/2026 |
| Account | GL account code or name |
| Debit | ₹ |
| Credit | ₹ |
| Description | "May 2026 Payroll — Salaries" |
| Reference | Pay run ID |

### GL Account Configuration
Zoho Payroll likely allows admin to map salary components to specific GL accounts:
- Basic Salary → GL Code 5001 (Salaries)
- HRA → GL Code 5002 (HRA Expense)
- EPF Employer → GL Code 5010 (PF Expense)
- etc.

If not configured, defaults to a single "Salaries & Wages" account.

### Integration Use Case
- Admin downloads Payroll Journal as CSV
- Imports into Tally / Zoho Books / accounting system
- Avoids manual journal entry — reduces reconciliation errors
- Some systems may have direct API integration (Zoho Books ↔ Zoho Payroll)

---

## Report 2: Activity Logs

**Purpose:** System-wide audit trail of all actions taken by all users. The primary audit mechanism for compliance and investigation.

### Expected Columns
| Column | Example |
|--------|---------|
| Date & Time | 2026-05-16 14:32:45 IST |
| User | admin@lerno.com |
| Action | "Approved Pay Run" |
| Module | Pay Runs |
| Entity | May 2026 Regular Payroll (ID: 3848927000000034159) |
| Entity ID | 3848927000000034159 |
| Old Value | Draft |
| New Value | Paid |
| IP Address | (if captured) |

### Action Types Logged (Expected)
| Category | Actions |
|----------|---------|
| Employee | Create Employee, Update Employee, Delete Employee |
| Pay Run | Create Pay Run, Update LOP, Add Variable Pay, Approve, Mark as Paid, Delete |
| Salary | Assign Salary Structure, Create Revision |
| Loans | Create Loan, Record Repayment, Pause, Delete |
| Declarations | Submit Declaration, Lock Declaration, Approve POI, Reject POI |
| Settings | Update Statutory Config, Update Pay Schedule, Add Pay Component |
| User Management | Create User, Assign Role, Remove User |
| Login/Logout | Login success, Login failure, Password change |

### Filtering
| Filter | Expected Options |
|--------|----------------|
| Date Range | From / To date picker |
| User | Dropdown of all system users |
| Module | All / Pay Runs / Employees / Loans / etc. |
| Action Type | Create / Update / Delete / Approve / etc. |

### Export
- Download as Excel/CSV for external audit review
- Tamper-evident: Zoho does not allow admin to delete or modify activity logs

---

## Statutory Relevance of Activity Logs

Under various Indian regulatory frameworks:
- **EPF Act / ESIC Act**: Employer must maintain payroll registers — activity logs support this
- **Income Tax Act Section 194C/D**: TDS computation audit trail required
- **IT Security**: SOC 2 / ISO 27001 compliance requires access and change logs
- Useful for: Internal audit, statutory inspections, labor dispute resolution

---

## Gaps / Observations
- Neither report individually opened — content inferred
- 🟡 Payroll Journal: GL account mapping configuration not observed — unclear if Zoho requires admin to set up GL codes
- 🟡 Zoho Books integration: Whether Zoho Payroll directly syncs with Zoho Books not verified
- Activity Logs: Cannot confirm tamper-evidence (no delete option visible from reports page)
- No SIEM integration (security event export) visible

## Open Questions
- [ ] Does Zoho Payroll have direct integration with Zoho Books for payroll journal entries?
- [ ] Can GL account codes be configured per salary component?
- [ ] Are Activity Logs paginated with full history, or limited to last N months?
- [ ] Who can access Activity Logs — all admins or only super admin?
- [ ] Is Activity Log export filterable before download (vs download all and filter locally)?
